name: Renal Ultrasound
description: Ultrasound of the kidneys for evaluation of renal parenchyma, collecting system, and vasculature

findings.technique: Ultrasound of the bilateral kidneys was performed with grayscale and Doppler imaging.
findings.comparison: No prior studies available for comparison.

sections.name: Right Kidney
sections.content: The right kidney measures approximately [X cm] in length and demonstrates [normal cortical echogenicity / no hydronephrosis / no stone / no mass]. The renal sinus is [normal / not echogenic].

sections.name: Left Kidney
sections.content: The left kidney measures approximately [X cm] in length and demonstrates [normal cortical echogenicity / no hydronephrosis / no stone / no mass]. The renal sinus is [normal / not echogenic].

sections.name: Collecting System
sections.content: The bilateral renal collecting systems are [not dilated / no mild dilation / no moderate-severe hydronephrosis]. No renal calculus.

sections.name: Renal Vasculature
sections.content: The bilateral renal arteries demonstrate [normal flow velocities / no stenosis]. The renal veins are [patent / no thrombosis].

sections.name: Bladder
sections.content: The bladder is [not distended / walls not thickened / no mass / no stone]. The ureteral jets are [present bilaterally / normal].

sections.name: Perirenal Space
sections.content: The perirenal spaces are [unremarkable / no fluid collection / no mass].

impression:
1. Normal renal ultrasound.
2. No hydronephrosis, renal mass, or stone identified.
author: RadReport Templates
